'''''Pizzazz'' 10''' is the tenth issue in the [[Marvel Comics]] popular culture monthly magazine. This issue was cover-dated [[July]] [[1978]] and featured the beginning of the serialized ''[[Star Wars]]'' comic ''[[The Kingdom of Ice]]''.<ref name="Issue 10" />

The issue features the article "The Monsters," discussing science fiction movie monsters, which includes [[Chewbacca/Legends|Chewbacca]] on the Most Likeable Monster list.<ref name="Issue 10" />
